case_title: HERITAGE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. DENNIS ORLANDO LEVERON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERITAGE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,350.00 FILED BY HERITAGE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVERON, DENNIS ORLANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATIO TO APPEAR: DAVID SOVEY TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERITAGE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-15-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $8000.00 OVER A PERIOD OF TWO YEARS. THE DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $300.00 OR MORE BY THE FIRST OF THE MONTH BEGINNING JUNE 1, 2017. PROGRESS REPORTS WILL BE SCHEDULED EVERY FOUR MONTHS. IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY FOUR MONTHS UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE THE PLAINTIFF WILL SEEK A JUDGMENT FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF $9,425.00. PLAINTIFF HERITAGE MANAGMENT SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESTED BY CARIG DUHLING, SECRETARY. DEFENDANT DENNIS PRLANDO LEVERON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $8000.00 OVER A PERIOD OF TWO YEARS. THE DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $300.00 OR MORE BY THE FIRST OF THE MONTH BEGINNING JUNE 1, 2017. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE THE PLAINTIFF WILL SEEK A JUDGMENT FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF $9,425.00. PLAINTIFF HERITAGE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS ORLANDO LEVERON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN JUNE 2017, IF NO APPEARANCE CONTINUE FOR 4 MONTHS. APPEAREANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. RESOLVE DATE SHOULD BE SEP-01-2020. JUDGE: A.
